description: overview.md states services communicate via gRPC over mTLS; this is consistent with decisions/2026-02-grpc-adoption.md but a hypothetical stale version of overview.md might say REST — no real contradiction here. This entry reserved for test extension.
decisions/2026-01-db-choice.md explicitly states MongoDB is NOT used in user-service. A hallucinating wiki might claim otherwise, creating a contradiction with this authoritative decision record.
